description_long: This object is a sword with a gently curved, single-edged blade that appears to be made of polished steel, giving it a reflective, silvery finish. The blade is broad and tapers slightly toward the tip, with a smooth, unadorned surface. The hilt features a prominent rectangular guard with metallic gold or brass coloring, providing protection for the hand. The handle is straight and robust, likely constructed from metal or wood with a metallic cap at the end, and is designed for a secure grip. The overall design is functional and minimalistic, with no visible engravings or decorative elements. The sword's proportions suggest it is intended for one-handed use, suitable for display or practical application.
description: A curved, single-edged sword with a polished steel blade, gold-toned guard, and a straight, sturdy handle. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade, gold-toned guard, and straight handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the blade's curve, guard, and handle from the reverse angle.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the slim profile of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, metallic or wood core, capped end, no visible wrapping or texture
